vllm.title: [Bugfix] handle alignment of arguments in convert_sparse_cross_attention_mask_to_dense
vllm.author: tjohnson31415
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Reproducing the bug reqiures a batch with a text-only request and a request with an image. With the OpenAI server, this can happen when under load, but it is easier to reproduce in offline mode:
from vllm import LLM, SamplingParams
from vllm.multimodal.utils import fetch_image

image_url = "https://

vllm.title: [Model] Refactoring of MiniCPM-V and add MiniCPM-o-2.6 support for vLLM
vllm.author: HwwwwwwwH
vllm.bodyExcerpt: This PR aims to adapt and support all the features of MiniCPM-V and MiniCPM-o. It is designed to be compatible with various modalities (image, video, audio), different model versions (2.0, 2.5, 2.6, o), and diverse input types (raw, embeddings), while maintaining support for LORA, which might requir

vllm.title: [Frontend] Support override generation config in args
vllm.author: liuyanyi
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Support override generation config in args
In my past pr #11164, generation config could be load from model or other file.
In this pr, generation config can be override by user in args or model config, this allow control generation config in cli args.
override_generation_config has been added to Mod

vllm.title: [Hardware][NV] Fix Modelopt model loading for k-v-scales for Llama models.
vllm.author: pavanimajety
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR enables loading ModelOpt checkpoints with .k_scale and .v_scale.
ModelOpt's kv scales are stored as:
 "model.layers.[layer-number].self_attn.k_proj.k_scale"
 "model.layers.[layer-number].self_attn.v_proj.v_scale"

In comparison, NeuralMagic's kv_scale is stored as model.layers.1.self_attn.kv

vllm.title: [Kernel] add triton fused moe kernel for gptq/awq
vllm.author: jinzhen-lin
vllm.bodyExcerpt: The current only option for using moe+gptq/awq is the Marlin kernel, but for the Marlin kernel, a single marlin_gemm_moe would launching num_experts CUDA kernels at least, while the fused_moe triton kernel only needs to launch one cuda kernel. This makes the Marlin kernel significantly slower than t

vllm.title: Revert "[Build/CI] Fix libcuda.so linkage"
vllm.author: tlrmchlsmth
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Looks like #12424 is causing problems for some users that don't have libcuda.so on their LD_LIBRARY_PATH. See #12505.
I believe there are potential linkage issues for _C.abi3.so, but I haven't seen any concrete examples of users running into any issues with this so I think it makes sense to revert t

vllm.title: [V1][BugFix] Free encoder cache for aborted requests
vllm.author: WoosukKwon
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR fixes a bug that encoder cache is not properly freed when the request is aborted.
Plus, this PR includes minor code cleanup.

vllm.title: [Misc][MoE] add Deepseek-V3 moe tuning support
vllm.author: divakar-amd
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
add moe tuning support for DeepSeek-V3
add arg.trust_remote_code for better user exeperience. Use --trut_remote_code when tuning for deepseek

Currently, DeepSeek-V3 runs into error when using graph-mode. This has been handled by forcing 'eager-mode' as a workaround. Hence, bypassing graph capture i

vllm.title: [V1][Metrics] Add GPU cache usage % gauge
vllm.author: markmc
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Follow on from #12530, part of #10582
Note - cpu_cache_usage is not implemented because it is not relevant in v1. CPU swapping (see --swap-space and --preemption-mode) was intended for beam search type use cases, but in v1 with prefix caching enabled by default, the preemption and recompute strategy
